questions: What is the patient's Period of Gestation (POG) in weeks?
What is the estimated acute blood loss in ml?
Is the cause suspected to be Placenta Praevia? (Yes/No)
Is the cause suspected to be Abruptio Placentae? (Yes/No)
Is the patient having active bleeding? (Yes/No)
Is the patient in labour pains? (Yes/No)
What is the foetal presentation (e.g., vertex, breech)?
Is the cervix favourable (e.g., Bishop score)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient's condition stable after initial resuscitation? (Yes/No)
